description: Hand-woven off-white cotton pouch with a fringed flap and lower fringe, featuring a central band of bold red and purple stripes edged in black and a narrow decorative white-on-black motif stripe above the body, suspended from a red-white-black twisted cotton strap.
Off-white cotton pouch with a simple flap, accented by a single black-edged red stripe and a narrower purple stripe just beneath the closure, hanging from a twisted red-white-black cotton cord.

Off-white woven pouch with a flap closure, decorated with paired bands of red and purple stripes separated by a narrow black stripe and highlighted with a white-on-black barcode-like motif, carried on a red-orange-black braided strap.

Handmade off-white cotton shoulder pouch with a fringed flap, bearing a multicolor band of red, purple, and black stripes above a central white field, topped with a narrow decorative dotted stripe and finished with a burgundy-white braided strap.

Off-white cotton pouch featuring bright red and purple stripe bands separated by thin black lines and a central white-on-black dotted stripe, all beneath a simple flap and suspended from a red-orange twisted cord, with a short fringe at the bottom edge.
